response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation pipelines, and his work with DLang and Node.js doesn't clearly align with the core requirement of high-performance C++ routing tile systems.
strengths: Built and maintained open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and systems thinking from dev-ops and infrastructure roles
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines
Primary language exposure is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — not aligned with C++ as primary requirement
Limited evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or low-latency routing data processing at scale
